message:
🐛 Replace unregistered card types in enterprise dashboard configs (#9810)

All 24 enterprise dashboard configs referenced card types like
workload_status, hipaa_compliance, nist_800_53, etc. that don't
exist in the card registry — causing 'Unknown card type' errors.

Replaced with real registered cards relevant to each vertical:
compliance_score, fleet_compliance_heatmap, workload_monitor,
trivy_scan, kubescape_scan, role_binding_status, etc.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,8 +8,8 @@ export const airgapDashboardConfig: UnifiedDashboardConfig = {
   statsType: 'security',
   cards: [
     { id: 'airgap-cluster-health', cardType: 'cluster_health', title: 'Cluster Health', position: { w: 4, h: 3 } },
-    { id: 'airgap-workloads', cardType: 'workload_status', title: 'Workload Status', position: { w: 4, h: 3 } },
-    { id: 'airgap-compliance', cardType: 'air_gap_readiness', title: 'Air-Gap Summary', position: { w: 4, h: 3 } },
